rag_rules: Place output range guarantees in component type scopes when concrete bounds or visible features are provided.
Use visible identifiers and named constants in AGREE contracts when available.
generic_rules: Formulate guarantees as boolean expressions linking visible variables to valid ranges or conditions.
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions in AGREE contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq` to define boolean helper variables for range checks in AGREE.
Wrap AGREE annex blocks in `annex agree { ... };` syntax.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type contracts.
Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in type-level contracts.
